title: Chittam Maharani
overview: Chaitra needs to return to her hometown as PM has announced national lockdown. Raju, a bike mechanic and her friend, agrees to take her. Meanwhile a little girl is kidnapped. Will Chaitra reach home safely? Is the little girl safe? What is Raju hiding from Chaitra?
